strengths: 10+ years full-stack experience across TypeScript/Node.js and React
Current role involves AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling, matching AI agent requirement
Strong testing/TDD background with workshops, courses, and craftsmanship practices
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience mentioned in resume
Limited evidence of Kotlin; Java experience is older (robotic arms, 2016-2018)
Cloud experience shown mainly via AWS CDK; Kubernetes mentioned but GCP/Azure not evident

key_factors.factor: AI agent and MCP tooling experience

response.justification: Candidate has well over the 6+ years required, with deep TypeScript/Node.js and React experience, a current role explicitly working on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators, and a strong testing/craftsmanship culture aligned with Vitest expectations. Gaps include no explicit Nest.js and only dated Kotlin/Java exposure, but the framework gap is easily bridged given the seniority and polyglot background.
